HI, I'M DEBROOP.
LET'S PEEP UNDER THE HAT

I grew up skipping cricket matches and Bollywood films to watch Anime and Cartoon Network — and in between those shows I used to obsess over the ads of Fevicol, Cadbury, and Coke. Not because I loved brands. Because I loved how they made a connect with Indian people. That instinct & curiosity turned into a career.

Over the last 8 years, I've worked at the crossroads of culture, storytelling, and strategy — building IPs that reshaped content platforms, launching films, collaborating with governments, and creating campaigns that connected with real people and delivered real results.

Scroll through my website to see my work and also me beyond work. Feel free to dial my number if you like the guy in the "Hat".

Currently Open To · Creative Director roles · Brand collaborations · Consulting

SKILLS & BEYOND

"Creativity without a plan is just instinct. Strategy is what I use to validate every idea — to shape it, test it, and make sure what gets executed is exactly what was imagined."

What I bring to the table

01 — Brand Strategy
Brand Strategy

I'm not here to build a logo or a tagline. I'm here to define the character of a brand — the rules that tell it who it is before it ever opens its mouth.

02 — Creative Direction
Creative Direction

The smallest ideas deserve the biggest executions. I take what lives in the margins of my notebook and build it into something you can't scroll past.

03 — IP & Platform Building
IP & Platform Building

I don't make content for campaigns. I build shows — formats with their own identity, their own audience, their own life long after the brief is closed.

04 — Social & Community
Social & Community

The best creator work doesn't feel like a deal — it feels like a recommendation from someone you trust. That's the standard every collaboration gets held to.

05 — Business & Pitches
Business & Pitches

A beautiful campaign that misses the business goal is still a failure. I work backwards from the outcome — every creative decision earns its place.

06 — AI & Creative Ops
AI & Creative Ops

I'm not waiting for AI to settle down. I've already built it into how I work — faster iterations, sharper outputs, same level of human judgment at the centre.

After Hours
Behind The Bar

Off Screen
Subtitles On

Bowl ready, anime on, phone face down. This is how I reset — and I will not be taking questions.

New City. New Brief.

No fixed itinerary. Just a hat, a direction, and the willingness to get properly lost.

Studio
